remarks: *HIGHEST AND BEST OFFERS DUE BY TUESDAY 7/21 at 12:00pm.* This 4-bedroom, 1-bath Cape-style home is ready for its next chapter. An estate sale being offered AS IS, this property presents a wonderful opportunity to add your own personal touches. Features include newer windows, newer kitchen cabinetry, and an updated bathroom. The flexible floor plan offers two bedrooms on the main level and two additional bedrooms upstairs, along with a living room, dining room, and eat-in kitchen and basement.  Situated on a level, fenced backyard with a one-car garage, this home also includes leased solar panels, which transfer with the property. Hardwood Floors under the carpet in living room. Conveniently located within walking distance to shops and restaurants, with easy access to the Merritt Parkway, this is an excellent opportunity for buyers looking to make a home their own. Don't miss it!
